query:
DELETE FROM bambina_checklist WHERE id = 28;
SELECT id, title, due_week FROM bambina_checklist WHERE due_week >= 36 ORDER BY due_week, sort_order;

rows.title: Regular Scan + Blood Count + Coagulation (36 WOG)

Set up nursery/baby area in accommodation
Weekly scans from 37 WOG - assess need for delivery
Ensure car seat is ready for hospital discharge
